prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约18358→19260→17545→18059→16357，近5年呈波动走势；2025年（物理类）基准位次约16357名，较2024年前移约1700名，为近年最优；本省理科/物理类计划2021年130人、2022年135人、2023年135人、2024年145人、2025年149人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划大幅增至193人，较2025年扩招44人（+29.5%），显著增加招生名额，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第57名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第62→2026年第57），学校综合实力持续增强；近年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第7（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A-、化学A-，共3个A-及以上学科；化工、材料为传统王牌，与招生专业中的工科试验班（先进材料、绿色化工等）高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，拉升相关专业组报考意愿；但化工、材料类属"生化环材"大类，社会热度明显劝退，部分抑制报考热情；本省2026年考生总数约120万，较2025年（约90.7万）大幅增长约32%，整体竞争加剧；北京化工大学位于北京市，属一线城市，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大（物理类193人），为本省考生提供了较多名额。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16357名、2026年大幅扩招44人（+29.5%）使位次后移，但本省考生总数增长约32%加剧竞争，学校排名上升及抖音高热提升关注度，热门专业（计算机、自动化等）拉升报考意愿，而化工材料类社会热度偏低形成对冲；预计2026年最低位次约19455名，区间18955–19955名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含电子信息工程、人工智能、计算机科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院）（含化学工程与工艺英才班、高分子材料与工程精英班、生物工程高精尖班）
- 自动化类（含自动化、测控技术与仪器）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）（含高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）（含机械设计制造及其自动化、过程装备与控制工程、机器人工程）
- 理科试验班（数学统计类）（含应用统计学、数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（化工能源与生物医药）（含化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程、环境工程、生物工程等）
- 理科试验班（绿色化学）（含应用化学、能源化学、资源化学）
- 安全工程
- 环境工程（环工、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间18955–19955名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（如18955以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、宏德书院等一档专业；位次接近区间下限（19955左右）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 18358 → 19260 → 18059 → 16357, showing a fluctuating trend over the past five years; in 2025 (physics category), the baseline ranking was about 16357, moving forward by about 1700 positions compared to 2024, the best in recent years; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 130 in 2021, 135 in 2022, 135 in 2023, 145 in 2024, and 149 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; in 2026, the plan significantly increased to 193, an expansion of 44 students (+29.5%) compared to 2025, notably increasing enrollment quotas and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026), indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; ranked 7th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with large short video exposure and relatively high application attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Chemistry A-, with a total of 3 A- and above disciplines; chemical engineering and materials are traditional strengths, highly corresponding to the engineering experimental classes (advanced materials, green chemical engineering, etc.) in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering have high social heat and are recommended, boosting the willingness to apply for related major groups; however, chemical engineering and materials fall under the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' category, with significantly lower social heat, partially suppressing application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, a substantial increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000), intensifying overall competition; Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Henan (193 in physics category), providing many slots for provincial candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16357, the significant expansion of 44 students (+29.5%) in 2026 will push the ranking backward, but the 32% increase in provincial candidates intensifies competition, the rise in school ranking and high Douyin heat increase attention, popular majors (computer science, automation, etc.) boost application willingness, while the low social heat of chemical and materials majors creates a counterbalance; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 19455, with a range of 18955–19955.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Class (including Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy) (including Chemical Engineering and Technology Elite Class, Polymer Materials and Engineering Elite Class, Bioengineering High-Precision Class)
- Automation Class (including Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials) (including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Statistics) (including Applied Statistics, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine) (including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Bioengineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry) (including Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Safety Engineering
- Environmental Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18955–19955, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 18955), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Class and Hongde Academy; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (around 19955), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 3636 → 20478 (anomaly, significant fluctuation in provincial control line that year) → 4164 → 4356 → 3818. Excluding the 2022 anomaly, the ranking fluctuated between 3600 and 4400 in the past four years. The baseline ranking for 2025 (history category) is approximately 3818. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 19 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 24 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 57th, with a steadily rising ranking in recent years and continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. Recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. It ranks 7th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. The university's strengths are concentrated in engineering disciplines such as chemical engineering, materials, and chemistry, with no A-class discipline evaluation support for liberal arts majors. However, the Law (Excellent Experimental Class) is the university's flagship liberal arts major.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has recommended/high social popularity, with strong application willingness. The Business Administration category shows differentiated wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000), intensifying overall competition. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional appeal for Henan liberal arts examinees. The history category enrolls 24 students, with stable quotas.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3818, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in the province intensifying competition, the rising university ranking and high Douyin popularity increasing attention, and the high popularity of the Law major, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3898, with a range of 3398 to 4398.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (Excellent Experimental Class)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Business Administration Category (Digital Finance and Intelligent Accounting) (including Business Administration, Financial Management, Accounting)
- International Economics and Trade (Digital Intelligence Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Administrative Management
- Public Affairs Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3398 to 4398, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 Law majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 3398), you can focus on aiming for Law (Excellent Experimental Class). If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 4398), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Administrative Management and Public Affairs Management.
